ingredients_text: Chocolate 96,4% (cane sugar, cocoa mass*, cocoa butter*, coconut powder*, rice drink powder* (rice*, gluten-free oat fiber* sunflower oil*, salt), emulsifier: sunflower lecithin*), caramel* (sugar*, glucose syrup*) 3 %, salt 0,6 %. *Ingredients from organic farming.
